grant_and_term.grant_type: Non-exclusive license to use System at specified location
grant_and_term.reserved_rights: Franchisor reserves right to own/operate/franchise competing brands anywhere; use System elements in Other Businesses; modify System elements
grant_and_term.restricted_area: Only if specifically agreed in Addendum; subject to extensive carve-outs

fee_obligations.set_off_right: Franchisor may set off amounts owed by franchisee against amounts owed to franchisee without notice (§8.7)
fee_obligations.interest_on_late_payment: 18% per annum or max lawful rate (§16.15)
fee_obligations.gross_receipts_tax_reimbursement: Franchisee must reimburse franchisor for any gross receipts tax imposed on fee payments (§8.4)

construction_requirements.architect_approval: Required before retaining architect, interior designer, GC, or major subcontractors (§6.1.1)
construction_requirements.plans_approval: Must receive written approval before starting construction; no changes without advance consent (§6.1.2–6.1.4)
construction_requirements.ada_compliance: Architect must certify ADA compliance; ADA survey may be required
construction_requirements.opening_inspection: Must pass opening inspection before authorization to open (§6.4)
construction_requirements.refurbishment: Must comply with renovation schedules including FRCM program, at franchisee's expense, no cap (§6.6)

training_obligations.mandatory_training: Key personnel must complete training before opening; replacements must complete training
training_obligations.costs_borne_by: Franchisee pays all fees, travel, lodging, and expenses
training_obligations.failure_consequence: Hotel opening may be delayed if staff not certified

operational_obligations.standards_compliance: Must comply with all Standards, Manual, and specifications for supplies (§5.1.2–5.1.3)
operational_obligations.signage: Must install and maintain per Standards (§5.1.4)
operational_obligations.advertising_approval: All materials require pre-approval; must immediately discontinue materials franchisor deems not in best interest (§5.1.7)
operational_obligations.customer_referral: Must refer guests only to System Hotels and (as directed) Network Hotels (§5.1.13)
operational_obligations.system_changes: Must comply with all System changes; no limit on franchisor's right to change System (§5.1.3, 5.1.6)
operational_obligations.technology_systems: Must purchase and maintain all designated systems (§5.1.6)

non_curable_defaults: Hotel closed 5 consecutive days (not Force Majeure) (§13.2(6))
termination_triggers.interim_remedies: Suspension from Reservation Service; removal from directories; diversion of reservations; disable software; revoke financial accommodations (§13.3)

transfer_restrictions.franchisor_transfer: May assign without consent if assignee assumes obligations (§12.1)
transfer_restrictions.permitted_transfers: No change of control: public equity, minority private, affiliates, family, trusts, death — some require notice and $5,500 fee (§12.2.1)
transfer_restrictions.coo_transfer: 60-day notice; $200K fee; full current requirements; new FA; possible PIP (§12.2.2)
transfer_restrictions.public_offering: 60-day advance notice; follow instructions re marks; indemnify franchisor; $5,000 fee (§12.3)
transfer_restrictions.mortgage_pledge: Allowed without notice/consent if sole borrower and loan secured only by hotel; all others require consent (§12.4)

noncompete.during_term: Cannot own or be licensor/franchisor of competing brand; may be franchisee, manager, or minority holder
noncompete.management_company_restriction: Management company cannot be exclusive manager for a Competitor

guaranty_scope.trigger: Required at application; additional guaranty may be required upon default notice or as condition of lender comfort letter
guaranty_scope.unlimited: Covers 'certain of the Franchisee's obligations' — scope determined per Guaranty form

liquidated_damages.pre_opening_no_construction: System's Avg Monthly Royalty × 60 (only if franchisee builds Competitor Brand within 1 year) (§13.4.1.1)
liquidated_damages.pre_opening_after_construction: System's Avg Monthly Royalty × 60 (unless Force Majeure) (§13.4.1.2)
liquidated_damages.post_opening_first_2_years: Greater of Hotel's or System's Avg Monthly Royalty × 60 (§13.4.1.3)
liquidated_damages.last_60_months: Hotel's Avg Monthly Royalty × remaining months (§13.4.1.5)
liquidated_damages.payment_due: 30 days following termination or on demand (§13.4.2)

venue_dispute.venue: Eastern District of Virginia (Alexandria); or Fairfax County, VA; or New York, NY; or county where hotel is located (§16.2.2)
venue_dispute.punitive_damages_waiver: Both parties waive punitive/exemplary damages from each other (§17.2)

insurance.requirement: Must maintain minimum levels and types per Manual; insurers must meet minimum ratings; must name additional insureds per Manual
insurance.failure_consequence: Franchisor may obtain and maintain insurance on franchisee's behalf and charge actual amounts

indemnification.scope: Franchisee must defend, indemnify, and hold harmless franchisor, Hilton Worldwide, and all affiliates' officers, directors, employees, agents, successors, and assigns
indemnification.coverage: Any claim, demand, tax, penalty, or proceeding arising from any claimed occurrence at the Hotel
indemnification.includes: Attorneys' fees, court costs, all expenses

force_majeure.effect: Excuses failure to complete Hotel Work; franchisee must take reasonable steps to minimize impact; hotel closure allowed if damaged by casualty/Force Majeure
force_majeure.max_closure: 18 months (franchisor may terminate if not reopened)

distinctive_clauses.confidentiality_of_negotiated_terms: Franchisee may not disclose negotiated terms to anyone without consent, except as required by law, in legal proceedings, or to officers/directors/attorneys/lenders (§16.18). Violation = default.
distinctive_clauses.exemption_acknowledgment: Franchisee acknowledges franchise sale exceeds $1,469,600 threshold (excluding land and franchisor financing), exempt from FTC Franchise Rule disclosure requirements (§18.0)
distinctive_clauses.notice_of_intent_to_market: Must notify franchisor before marketing equity interests (§19.0)
distinctive_clauses.data_ownership: All information generated at Hotel or about guests is franchisor's property (§10.4)
distinctive_clauses.management_approval: Franchisor must approve all management; if management company becomes Competitor or is terminated, 90 days to replace (§7.0)
